profile.name: Neev Shah
profile.about: Neev Shah is a 14-year-old who plays Division 1 soccer and is built different on the pitch. When he's not playing soccer, he's usually on his PS5 playing Rocket League or FC.

bot.fallback: I'm just Neev's website bot, so I only know the main facts for now.
bot.greeting: Ask me about Neev's birthday, age, games, Roblox username, favourite food, favourite colour, favourite artist, or who Neev is.

answers.answer: Neev's favourite games are FC and Rocket League.
Neev's favourite food is pizza and pasta.
Neev's favourite colour is light blue.
Neev's favourite artist is Central Cee.
Neev Shah is a 14-year-old Division 1 soccer player who is built different on the pitch and loves playing FC and Rocket League on PS5.
